summary: Completed full Playwright frontend test of Faraz Khan static React portfolio. All 10 specified flows pass; no console errors on any route.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor naming: landing page hero testid is 'hero' (spec mentioned 'hero-heading'). Spec compliance still satisfied since hero heading is present and visible.

Landing-page project cards use 'project-card-<slug>' (singular) while /projects route uses 'projects-card-<slug>' (plural). Intentional and matches review request, but worth documenting for consistency.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 review-request flows pass. URL: https://designer-hub-162.preview.emergentagent.com. Key testids: nav-{projects,about,services,contact}, sidebar-book-call, projects-card-<slug>, primary-email-link, faq-*. Static SPA, no backend.
